allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Add verbose logging to docs build workflow for CI debugging *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix docs workflow: remove continue-on-error and add build verification *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add debugging steps to diagnose Docusaurus build failure in CI *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add line ending normalization to prevent CI build issues *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Downgrade Docusaurus to 3.4.0 to fix webpack ProgressPlugin compatibility *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Update workflow to use npm install --legacy-peer-deps *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Switch Node.js to v24 in docs workflow *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix docs workflow: revert to Docusaurus 3.10.0 with Node 24 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Switch to MkDocs for documentation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix mkdocs.yml: remove problematic extensions and simplify config *)
